info.name: Pantry
info.summary: Manage your household: shared checklists, photo boards, and notes.
info.description:
Pantry helps households stay organized in Nextcloud.
- **Houses** group members and their shared data. A person can belong to multiple houses and switch between them freely. - **Checklists** support recurring items (e.g. milk every week) that automatically reappear when due. Share lists with the whole household so everyone knows what to pick up. - **Photo boards** let you keep shared reference photos organized in folders — the right brand of dog food, a favorite recipe card, a product label, and so on. - **Notes wall** gives the household a lightweight shared space for reminders, pinned messages, and quick notes with customizable colors. - **Notifications** keep everyone in the loop when photos are uploaded or notes are added or edited.
All data is scoped to a house; members only see the houses they belong to.
info.author: Chen Asraf
